channel.title: Trash Here Engineering & Climate Blog
channel.description: Dispatches on algorithmic waste routing, SHA-256 carbon manifests, weighbridge IoT telemetry, and circular economy infrastructure.

item.title: How AI Polyline Routing Reduces Municipal Fuel Emissions by 38%
item.description: Traditional garbage trucks follow rigid, static weekly schedules—driving thousands of miles of deadhead routes to empty half-full dumpsters while overflowing bins in dense commercial corridors sit unattended. At Trash Here, we took a radically different engineering approach.

item.title: The Rise of SHA-256 Cryptographic Manifests in Corporate ESG Auditing
item.description: For decades, corporate sustainability teams and environmental regulators have struggled with a fundamental flaw in recycling carbon accounting: the lack of verifiable, tamper-proof audit trails. Discover how Trash Here generates SHA-256 cryptographic manifests directly from 50-ton industrial weighbridge IoT telemetry.

item.title: Monetizing Urban Scrap: How Independent Collectors Earn Instant Stripe Connect Payouts
item.description: In traditional solid waste hauling, independent drivers and scrap collectors face exploitative brokerage fees and net-60 payment terms. By integrating automated double-entry ledger reconciliation with Stripe Connect, Trash Here enables instant payouts the second a load is weighed.
